title: Level 18.66
wikitext:
{{Notice|body=It's recommended to read this page in FullScreen for the full black and white immersion.}}
It is highly recommended to read this page in DARK MODE. As the tone & story of Level 18.66 is much better in Dark mode.
 {{Distress Theme}} {{CSS|content= html { filter: grayscale(100%) contrast(1.05) brightness(.95) !important; animation: pageAppear 5.5s ease-in-out forwards; } ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0f0f0f; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #666; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #0f0f0f; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #999; } }} {{Audio|file=Cartoon Dog Theme Song 2021.mp3|volume=0.377|secrettext=Music|loop=true}} __NOTOC__{{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 18.66: Decaying Memory}}
Childhood is not always all fun. Trauma never goes away. Once you fold a paper too much, you can never bring it back to its original state.
{{Class 5|color-h=136|color-s=0%|color-l=13%|safety=Fast-Collapsing Level|security=Very Unstable|entity=High Entity Count}}
Level 18.66 is a sub-level of [[Level 18|Level 18]].
== Description == {{Blurimage|file=1027180-temple-white-black-monochrome-street-architecture-building-abandoned-road-hallway-HDR-door-stairs-prison-prisons-infrastructure-light-alley-darkness-urban-area-black-an.jpg|caption=An early stage 3 manifestation of level 18.66, specifically an abandoned and decaying house.}} {{Blurimage|file=Pexels-bnwtake0405-16321307.jpg|caption=A Stage 1 manifestation of level 18.66, The photo shows the wanderer at the entrance of an attic.}} Level 18.66, similar to [[Level 18|Level 18]], resembles the nightmares that the wanderer had during their childhood, these nightmares are most common from as early as 3 years old but as old as 15 years old. This level poses a significant environmental risk. It is known that if a person trying to enter Level 18.66 is 2 years old or younger, they can not enter. The level physically won't let them enter Level 18.66. As soon as one enters level 18.66, the nightmare will appear very decayed. Within' a few minutes, the walls, ceiling, and floor can already start to fall and collapse. Something as simple as walking on even a slightly worn-out concrete floor can drop the wanderer a few floors down to their death. There is a very strange phenomenon that occurs within level 18.66. All types of imagery are monochrome/black and white. This applies to the wanderer's vision and any type of camera or mirror. This effect can only wear off once said wanderer, camera, or mirror leaves level 18.66. === Manifestations === Manifestations of level 18.66 are different for every wanderer, and only one wanderer can be in a manifestation at once, nor can a wanderer enter a manifestation of a different wanderer. These manifestations resemble a nightmare from the wanderer's past or a terrifying experience; however, this nightmare could actually cause real death and damage. One detail to note of manifestations of level 18.66 is that even if the nightmare was originally not appearing decayed, it will be decayed in level 18.66. Another phenomenon is that upon entering the level, the wanderer might feel "younger"; the objects around them are much bigger, as if they were a child again. However, some aspects still don't change. They will look the same and have the same voice as they did before entering the level, but feel much smaller compared to how they were. Any clothes that the wanderer was wearing before entering would not be changed upon entry, so upon entering, one might feel oversized clothes on them, although they never changed size. Something unexplainable occurs to a wanderer's mind upon leaving that cannot be classified as a phenomenon. This effect is that the A wanderer will still feel small and see in black & white a few minutes after leaving the sub-level. They will have this effect wear off shortly. A manifestation is roughly 8 kilometers in size; reaching this 8-kilometer edge reveals [[The Void|The Void]] or an impenetrable concrete wall. If the manifestation is based outside, it'll instead reveal an endlessly stretching and very densely packed forest. The following are the 3 most common types of manifestations:
Childhood Home
This manifestation is reported in over 39.33% of all wanderers who enter the level and survive. It resembles the wanderer's childhood home but abandoned. Manifestation stages in the childhood home last very long, with "Decay" lasting 9 minutes, "Rot" lasting 17 minutes, and "Collapse" lasting 3 minutes.
Attic
This manifestation is reported in over 21.66% of all wanderers who enter the level and survive. It resembles that "always creepy" attic that the wanderer had in their childhood; however, it's abandoned. Manifestation stages last decently long, with "Decay" lasting 7 minutes, "Rot" lasting 15 minutes and "Collapse" lasting 5 minutes.
Daycare
This manifestation is reported in over 20.33% of all wanderers who enter the level and survive. It resembles the wanderer's childhood daycare. The daycare manifestation has an exclusive entity; "The Caretaker," which wanderers report looks like the caretaker they had at their childhood daycare but with the face of a [[Entity 9|Faceling]]. Stages in these manifestations last the longest, "Decay" lasting 11 minutes, "Rot" lasting 20 minutes, and "Collapse" lasting 7 minutes. The following is a type of manifestation that is unique compared to all other types.
Sleep Paralysis
{{Blurimage|file=Scary guy lollolol6556.jpg|caption=A screenshot of a video that had captured a Smiler. This happened because the wanderer described "I fell into Level 18.66 as soon I started recording. I saw this."|hovertext=YES I KNOW THIS IMAGE IS EVERYWHERE|align=right}} This manifestation does not follow the typical four stages that all other manifestation types go through. This manifestation involves the wanderer feeling as if they woke up in their childhood during the night but all voluntary muscles excluding the eye muscles have been paralyzed - This condition is called Sleep Paralysis which is temporary and happens when the brain thinks it is asleep but the mind is awake. When the wanderer first appears in their bed, they will notice their inability to move. After roughly a minute, [[Entity 3|Smilers]] will begin to enter the room. The wanderer must avoid eye movement at all costs when a [[Entity 3|Smiler]] is in the room. If the wanderer moves their eye too much, the [[Entity 3|Smiler]] will notice it and kill the wanderer. [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]] will begin to enter the room roughly 20 minutes after the wanderer enters the level. [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]] will be triggered by how the wanderer breathes. The wanderer must hold their breath at all costs, this is very challenging since [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]] can stay in a room for up to 3 minutes. During these 3 minutes - only if a wanderer must - they can take a breath to last another minute. The skin-stealer will notice this breath but not immediately be startled by it. Roughly 30-50 minutes after entering a sleep paralysis manifestation, all entities will quickly leave the room, and the wanderer will suddenly fall asleep, waking up on the floor in [[Level 18|Level 18]] or [[Level 19|Level 19]]. ==== Stages of Manifestations ==== When entering the sub-level by noclipping, the wanderer may see the level materialize for less than a second, where once it is complete - they will be able to roam the level.
Stage 1: "Ruins"
This stage is the first and most safest of the stages. This stage lasts only 1-3 minutes after entering. It will depict a childhood nightmare or bad memory but abandoned, it also includes the most entities. These entities include: [[Entity 3|Smilers]], [[Entity 9| Facelings]], [[Entity 6| Dullers]], [[Entity 24|Refuses]] and [[Entity 4| Deathmoths]].
Stage 2: "Decay"
This stage is the first stage to begin exhibiting collapse. This stage lasts 5-10 minutes after Stage 1 ends. When comparing a photo of Stage 1 and Stage 2: Stage 2 will appear to have decayed very quickly, with wood scraping, doors creaking, and floors cracking. [[Entity 24| Refuses]] suddenly disappear during this stage for unknown reasons.
Stage 3: "Rot"
This stage lasts 10-20 minutes after Stage 2 ends. Metals, wood, and all organic matter such as fruits, vegetables and even other entities will begin to rot very quickly and die. It is extremely dangerous to touch rotted surfaces on this level, as the rotted surfaces exhibit an unresearched fungal disease that quickly infects anything living and fills the tissue with the spores eating an entire human in 2 hours. Rotted surfaces are also very fragile, as standing on a rotted floor may cause it to collapse, and standing below a rotted ceiling has a risk of it falling onto one and causing severe brain damage. Most entities die during this stage due to fungal infections.
Stage 4: "Collapse"
This is the final stage of a Level 18.66 manifestation, it lasts less than 5 minutes but is the most dangerous stage. During this stage, the fungal rot will spread at a rate of 20 cm/s; this results in the whole manifestation decaying and rotting very quickly - eventually collapsing into [[The Void|The Void]], However it is impossible to escape in the final 30 seconds of "Collapse" since brain damage/death is guaranteed from collapsing floorboards, concrete and other objects. == Colonies & Outposts == It is impossible to create and/or maintain a Colony/Outpost here due to the sub-levels severely hazardous properties. == ==
Entrances
* Thinking about nightmares or staying in a bad memory in [[Level 18|Level 18]] can cause one to suddenly lose consciousness and wake up in Level 18.66. * Noclipping in [[Level 17|Level 17]] has a 0.59% chance to bring one to Level 18.66 instead of [[Level 18|Level 18]].
Exits
Level 18]]. * Surviving Sleep Paralysis will wake one up in [[Level 18|Level 18]] or [[Level 19|Level 19]] * Noclipping through a table will bring one to [[Level 521|Level 521]]. * Noclipping through an unopened exit door will bring one to [[Level 21|Level 21]].
